int_common_01.name: Slime
int_common_01.body: A spreading organic mass that blocks movement through the affected station. Crew members cannot pass through until the slime is removed. Requires crew presence and B button action to clean up.
int_common_01.details: Appears in a specific station. Blocks all movement through that station. Requires a crew member to use the B action while in the station to remove it. Health: 2.

int_common_02.name: Overheated Reactor
int_common_02.body: The reactor in the affected zone begins to overheat. Each turn, 1 energy is lost from the zone. A crew member must be present in the Lower deck of the affected zone and press the A button to cool it down.
int_common_02.summary: Drains 1 energy per turn from the zone
int_common_02.details: Appears in one zone's Lower deck. Loses 1 energy per turn until resolved. Requires A button action in the Lower deck station to fix.

int_common_03.name: Malfunction
int_common_03.body: A critical system malfunctions. The main system (A button) in the affected station is disabled until repaired. A crew member must press the B button in that station to perform repairs.
int_common_03.summary: Disables the A button in a station
int_common_03.details: Disables the primary system of one station. B button action in the affected station repairs it. Until repaired, A actions in that station have no effect.

int_common_04.name: Intruders
int_common_04.body: Hostile aliens have boarded the ship. They occupy a station and deal 1 damage to the zone each turn. Crew members must fight them using B button actions or battle bots in the same station.
int_common_04.details: Appears in a specific station. Deals 1 damage per turn to the zone. Requires crew B actions or battle bots to defeat. Health: 3.

int_common_05.name: Power Surge
int_common_05.body: An electrical surge damages the ship's wiring. Drains 1 energy from all three zones simultaneously each turn until resolved. Requires a crew member in Lower White to press B to reset the system.
int_common_05.summary: Drains 1 energy from all zones per turn
int_common_05.details: Affects all zones. Loses 1 energy per zone per turn. Must be resolved at the Lower White station using B action.

int_common_06.name: Saboteur
int_common_06.body: A malfunctioning robot is sabotaging ship systems. Moves between stations each turn. Disables the system in whatever station it currently occupies. Must be caught and deactivated by a crew member using B action.
int_common_06.details: Moves one station per turn. Disables all actions in its current station. Requires crew B action in the same station to defeat. Health: 2.

int_serious_01.name: Alien Brood
int_serious_01.body: A nest of alien creatures rapidly multiplying inside the ship. Starts with 2 damage per turn and increases by 1 each turn. Spreads to adjacent stations if not destroyed quickly. Requires multiple crew members using B actions to eradicate.
int_serious_01.summary: Escalating damage that spreads to adjacent stations
int_serious_01.details: Serious threat. Damage increases each turn. Spreads to adjacent stations after 2 turns. Requires concentrated B actions from multiple crew members. Health: 6.

int_serious_02.name: Core Breach
int_serious_02.body: A critical breach in the ship's reactor core. Deals 2 damage to the affected zone each turn and prevents the central reactor from being charged. If not sealed within 3 turns, the zone is destroyed.
int_serious_02.summary: Critical reactor damage with a time limit
int_serious_02.details: Serious threat. Appears in one zone's Lower deck. 2 damage per turn. Blocks reactor charging. Zone destruction after 3 turns if unresolved. Requires 2 crew A actions in the same station to seal.

int_serious_03.name: Phantom
int_serious_03.body: An invisible entity that haunts the ship. Cannot be fought directly. Each turn, it randomly disables one station's systems. Only visual confirmation (Upper White B action) reveals its location, allowing crew to fight it.
int_serious_03.summary: Invisible threat that disables random stations
int_serious_03.details: Serious threat. Randomly disables one station per turn. Requires visual confirmation to locate, then crew B actions to defeat. Health: 4.

int_serious_04.name: Commandeered Battlebot
int_serious_04.body: The ship's battle bot has been hijacked and turned against the crew. It moves through the ship attacking crew members, forcing them to flee their stations. Deals 1 damage to the zone and displaces any crew in the station.
int_serious_04.summary: Hijacked bot that attacks crew and zones
int_serious_04.details: Serious threat. Moves each turn. Displaces crew from its station. Deals 1 damage per turn to the zone. Must be deactivated with 2 B actions from crew in the same station. Health: 5.
